description: Axi is an international Forex and CFD broker established in 2007, recognized as a trader-friendly ECN broker suitable for all experience levels. Axi offers competitive spreads, rapid execution, and robust trading platforms including MetaTrader 4 and MetaTrader 5. The broker serves clients globally under stringent regulations and comprehensive service standards.
keyAdvantages: Transparent and low cost fee structure
advantages: Low spreads and fast execution speeds
disadvantages: Effective minimum for ECN is relatively higher
Fixed commission per lot on Pro ECN accounts

faqs.question: Is Axi safe?
faqs.answer: Yes — Axi is supervised by major regulators including the FCA, ASIC, and FSCA (specific entity depends on your region).

faqs.question: What is the minimum deposit?
faqs.answer: There is no official minimum deposit requirement, though a starting balance of $200 is recommended for stable execution.

faqs.question: Which platforms are supported?
faqs.answer: MT4, MT5, Web, and Mobile platforms.

faqs.question: What is the maximum leverage?
faqs.answer: Up to 1:500, depending on the regulatory jurisdiction and entity.

faqs.question: Does Axi offer ECN accounts?
faqs.answer: Yes — the Pro ECN account offers ultra-low spreads for high volume traders.
